bullish: EMA9 above EMA21 and price above session VWAP (trendBias = +1, no conflict)
Dashboard Signal Type reads "Bullish Continuation" or "Bullish Reversal"
Confidence gauge at or above Minimum Bayesian Confidence (60% default)
Bull Score trending toward Grade A (>= 8) or better
bearish: EMA9 below EMA21 and price below session VWAP (trendBias = -1, no conflict)
Dashboard Signal Type reads "Bearish Continuation" or "Bearish Reversal"
Confidence gauge at or above Minimum Bayesian Confidence (60% default)
Bear Score trending toward Grade A (>= 8) or better
neutral: EMA9/EMA21 and VWAP disagree, or trendBias = 0
Dashboard Signal Type reads "Range / No Edge"
Bull Score and Bear Score within 1-2 points, neither reaching Grade B (6)

risk_rules: Only take signals that pass the indicator's hard gates: bullScore/bearScore >= 9 and Bayesian confidence >= 60%
Only take trades with R:R >= 1:2, as enforced by the minRR input
Risk 1% of starting equity ($250) per trade based on the stopBuffer-derived stop distance
Cap total open risk at 2% of starting equity ($500), well inside the $1,000 Max Loss Limit
No new entries in the first 15 minutes of an active ORB window (08:00, 03:00, 19:00 EST)
Maximum 2 open positions at once, never duplicated on the same symbol
Two losing trades in a row stops trading for the remainder of the session
Flatten all positions by 4:30 PM EST, 15 minutes ahead of Lucid's 4:45 PM EST mandatory close
No martingaling - every trade sized identically off the 1% rule regardless of prior outcome
Treat the EOD trailing Max Loss Limit as breachable intraday - keep $200 of daily buffer beneath it
notes: Apex Predator Master v2.0.0-alpha.7. Watchlist and timeframe fixed per original basis. Lucid $25,000 LucidPro/LucidFlex figures (Max Loss Limit $1,000, evaluation target $1,250/5%, 2-mini/20-micro position cap) verified via support lucidtrading.com on 2026-07-19 -re-verify before live use. Re-check macro calendar (CPI, FOMC, NFP) each day and stand aside from NQ/ES/GC signals during high-impact releases even if the indicator qualifies a trade.
